case_title: PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF THE CALIFORNIA VS. PIONEER SHIP MANAGEMENT SERVICES LLC et al

docket_entries.description: CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF OCT-10-2012 IS OFF CALENDAR - JUDGMENT ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF THE CALIFORNIA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PIONEER SHIP MANAGEMENT SERVICES LLC SOUTH HARMONY SHIPPING INC. SEE SCANNED JUDGMENT FOR DETAILS

TOXIC TORT/ENVIRONMENT, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF THE CALIFORNIA AS TO DEFENDANT PIONEER SHIP MANAGEMENT SERVICES LLC SOUTH HARMONY SHIPPING INC. NO SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR OCT-10-2012 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  JUL-09-2012 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         SEP-25-2012
STIPULATION FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF THE CALIFORNIA ALSO FILED BY DEFENDANT PIONEER SHIP MANAGEMENT SERVICES LLC SOUTH HARMONY SHIPPING INC.
